purpose: Define initial ETS TLA+ models targeted for SMT-backed symbolic verification.
researchBoundary: These targets establish bounded symbolic validation. They do not constitute universal theorem proof or complete protocol correctness.

targets.reason: Base append-only evidence-state model with safety-oriented invariants.
Core verifier quorum and conflict semantics model.
Bounded asynchronous transport and replay-order semantics model.
Important model, but may require symbolic-safe refactoring due temporal and adversarial transition complexity.
Discretized confidence semantics model. Symbolic-safe coverage should be added after core safety models are stable.
Liveness and fairness model. Symbolic liveness requires separate treatment and should not be conflated with safety checking.
